---
title: "Creating the ``r params$package_name`` R package"
author: "Di Wu, Jacob Bien, Snigdha Panigrahi"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
site: bookdown::bookdown_site
knit: litr::render
output: litr::litr_gitbook
params:
  package_name: "randhclust"
  package_parent_dir: "." # <-- relative to this file's location
documentclass: book
---

# Introduction

This document is a literate programming implementation of the ``r params$package_name`` R package, which makes the algorithms proposed in [Hierarchical Clustering With Confidence](https://www.arxiv.org/abs/2512.06522) (Wu, Bien, Panigrahi 2025) accessible to R users.

**Note:** If you are working in RStudio, you can simply press "Knit" to render this bookdown (and open `_book/index.html` to see the result).  More generally, in a console you can run the following:

```{r, eval = FALSE}
litr::render("index.Rmd", output_format = litr::litr_gitbook())
```
